headline: ARKEUS ANNOUNCES $18M SERIES A TO SCALE AI SENSING SYSTEMS FOR AUTONOMOUS PLATFORMS OPERATING IN CONTESTED MILITARY ENVIRONMENTS
summary: Arkeus, a defense technology company building AI powered sensing systems that serve as the eyes and brains of autonomous platforms, has raised $18 million in Series A funding to accelerate its global expansion and scale manufacturing capability in the United States, Australia, and Europe.
